title: chaenorhinum cadevallii
intro: Chaenorhinum cadevallii, also known as the Cade's balm or rock rose, is a flowering plant species in the family Scrophulariaceae. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of skin conditions such as eczema and acne, due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Chaenorhinum cadevallii include its ability to soothe and calm irritated skin, reduce inflammation, and promote wound healing. Herbal preparations of Chaenorhinum cadevallii can be made into infusions, tinctures, or creams, which are often used topically to harness its medicinal properties.
